name: Media Buying Budget Reallocation Review
description: Review campaign performance and prepare evidence-backed budget changes for approval.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to review campaign performance and prepare evidence-backed budget changes for approval.
Best for growth and paid media teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Orient From Budget History
stages.summary: Read budget policy, recent performance, prior budget changes, learnings, and decisions.

stages.title: Fetch Metric Gaps
stages.summary: Use granted read actions only when stored evidence is insufficient.

stages.title: Propose Changes
stages.summary: Produce a bounded reallocation recommendation with rationale, risk, and observation plan.

stages.title: Optional Apply Changes
stages.summary: Execute approved budget update actions only when granted by the concrete plan.
